'''Capital Codru''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Munto Codru/Legends|Munto Codru]]. The city was home to a [[Munto Codru Spaceport|spaceport]] and the [[Forbidden Castle]].<ref name="TEGtPaM" />

{{City-stub}}
